summary: A compact, cost-effective RP2040-based development board with USB-C connectivity, on-board flash storage, and 3.3V regulated power. Designed as a Raspberry Pi Pico-compatible board with improved power delivery via USB-C and an integrated WS2812B status LED.

requirements.description: MCU shall be RP2040 dual-core ARM Cortex-M0+ at 133 MHz
requirements.rationale: Core processing requirement for Pico compatibility

requirements.description: Board shall expose 26 GPIO pins accessible via castellated pads
requirements.rationale: Standard Pico pinout for peripheral compatibility

requirements.description: Board shall include 16MB QSPI flash for program storage
requirements.rationale: Ample storage for MicroPython/CircuitPython firmware and user code

requirements.description: USB-C connector for power and data transfer
On-board WS2812B RGB LED for status indication
Board shall support USB 1.1 Full Speed (12 Mbps)
requirements.rationale: Required for RP2040 USB peripheral operation

requirements.description: PCB dimensions shall be 51mm x 21mm, 2-layer, 1.6mm thickness
All components shall be SMD, no through-hole parts except USB-C connector
requirements.rationale: Enables automated assembly and reduces cost
